body:
status=open
reason=Bash tool unusable in this execution worktree — every invocation fails with "ENOSPC: no space left on device, mkdir '/tmp/claude-501/-Users-erik-Projects--ddx-exec-wt--execute-bead-wt-ddx-7f822565-20260708T202920-0d5cd096'" even for trivial commands (echo hello) and with dangerouslyDisableSandbox=true. This is the tool's own /tmp bookkeeping directory creation failing due to host-level disk exhaustion, not a repo or code issue. Read/Write/Edit tools still function (verified against this repo and bundle path), but git status/diff/commit, go test, and lefthook all require a shell and are therefore unavailable. No source changes were made because I cannot inspect git state, run the Go test suite, or execute lefthook pre-commit to validate any edit before committing — committing blind would violate the "do not commit red code" requirement and the mandatory pre-commit gate for this bead. Retry expectation: this is a transient host resource condition (disk full on the execution host / stale /tmp/claude-501 accumulation). A retry on a host with free disk space (or after /tmp/claude-501 is cleaned up) should allow Bash to function normally and let the bead proceed as specified.
suggested_action=retry with a smart agent

no_changes
rationale: status: open
reason: Bash tool unusable in this execution worktree — every invocation fails with
  "ENOSPC: no space left on device, mkdir '/tmp/claude-501/-Users-erik-Projects--ddx-exec-wt--execute-bead-wt-ddx-7f822565-20260708T202920-0d5cd096'"
  even for trivial commands (echo hello) and with dangerouslyDisableSandbox=true.
  This is the tool's own /tmp bookkeeping directory creation failing due to host-level
  disk exhaustion, not a repo or code issue. Read/Write/Edit tools still function
  (verified against this repo and bundle path), but git status/diff/commit, go test,
  and lefthook all require a shell and are therefore unavailable.

No source changes were made because I cannot inspect git state, run the Go test
suite, or execute lefthook pre-commit to validate any edit before committing —
committing blind would violate the "do not commit red code" requirement and the
mandatory pre-commit gate for this bead.

Retry expectation: this is a transient host resource condition (disk full on the
execution host / stale /tmp/claude-501 accumulation). A retry on a host with free
disk space (or after /tmp/claude-501 is cleaned up) should allow Bash to function
normally and let the bead proceed as specified.
decision_audit={"failure_class":"no_changes","retry_action":"retry","escalation_count":1,"requested_route":{"harness":"claude","model":"sonnet","profile":"default","routing_intent_source":"cli"},"actual_route":{"harness":"claude","model":"sonnet","route_reason":"cli"},"review_status":"skipped","review_skip_reason":"review_not_configured","review_classification":"review_skipped","land_status":"not_landed","reconcile_status":"not_applicable"}

outcome_reason=no_changes

{"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. `TestDoctorUnjam_CheckpointsDDxOwnedState` in `cli/cmd/doctor_unjam_test.go` creates dirty `.ddx/executions/` and `.ddx/metrics/` files, runs `ddx doctor --unjam`, asserts a checkpoint commit exists, and asserts the JSON summary names the committed paths and action.","coverage":"child 1 AC 1 and AC 2"},{"parent_ac":"2. `TestDoctorUnjam_StashesPreserveDerivedPaths` in `cli/cmd/doctor_unjam_test.go` creates a `refs/ddx/iterations/**` preserve ref and matching leaked worktree content, runs `ddx doctor --unjam`, and asserts `git stash list` contains a message naming that preserve ref while the leaked path is clean.","coverage":"child 2 AC 1 and AC 2"},{"parent_ac":"3. `TestDoctorUnjam_ReportsUnknownDirtyPathsOnly` in `cli/cmd/doctor_unjam_test.go` creates unrelated dirty code/docs paths, runs `ddx doctor --unjam`, and asserts the files remain dirty/unmodified, no checkpoint commit or stash is created for them, and the JSON summary reports them as untouched.","coverage":"child 3 AC 1 and AC 3"},{"parent_ac":"4. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/... -run 'DoctorUnjam' -count=1` passes.","coverage":"child 1 AC 3; child 2 AC 3; child 3 AC 4"},{"parent_ac":"5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"child 1 AC 4; child 2 AC 4; child 3 AC 5"}],"child_ids":["ddx-d125d464","ddx-2af3fdad","ddx-9f33b39e"],"rationale":"The parent bead contains three independent behavioral slices plus shared verification. Splitting into checkpoint, preserve-ref stash, and report-only/no-mutation children keeps each child self-contained, testable, and executable without cross-child coordination while preserving the existing worktree cleanup behavior in the report-only slice."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
